data.body: Make plain-text 'kno show' expose lease context without requiring --json. For a work/gate knot with a bound lease, show the lease id and the bound lease agent metadata in the standard text output. For a lease knot, show its lease id and lease agent metadata in the standard text output as well. Preserve existing JSON behavior; this work is specifically about human-readable show output parity and robustness around lease-backed metadata visibility.
data.title: Show lease metadata in text output
